meta.siteDescription: Articles about frontend engineering, web architecture and design systems by Andrii Pap (@Andersseen).
meta.aboutDescription: Architecture baseline for Andrii Pap blog

home.headline: Technical articles on my own blog, with the same visual DNA as my portfolio.
home.description: This space mirrors the Andersseen Dev style to publish about Angular, TypeScript, design systems and frontend architecture without relying only on Medium.
editorialPoints: Real experiments with Angular and Web Components
Tooling, DX and code quality insights

about.title: About this project
paragraphs: This blog is designed to scale without friction: decoupled layers, strict typing, controlled global state and local IndexedDB persistence for preferences and future sessions.
The UI is built with modular Astro components, while Angular is configured for dynamic islands when interactivity truly adds value.
